title: Create 10+ example wiki templates
description: Examples: open tasks by priority, burndown for epic, blocked issues, sprint status, project overview. Store in specs/fixtures/wiki_examples/.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Creating 10+ example wiki templates under project/wiki using the documented template functions and cross-compatible syntax.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added 11 example wiki templates under project/wiki (status counts, open tasks by priority, epic progress, blocked issues, assignee list, high-priority queue, status table, issue detail, epic children, issue blocks, label limit) and updated project/wiki/index.md to link them.
